case_title: NINA SMITH VS. A BED OF FLOWERS INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, NINA AS TO DEFENDANT A BED OF FLOWERS INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA A BED OF FLOWERS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
